sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_du_extend_t (personnelid,incontrollevel,jointcontrollevel,jurisdictunit1,jurisdictpolice1,policephone1,jurisdictunit2,jurisdictpolice2,policephone2, personneltype,narcoticstype,firsttime,lasttime,controlstatus,caredperson,safetyaction,actualstate,attachments, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo,ptype) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$incontrollevel$','$jointcontrollevel$','$jurisdictunit1$','$jurisdictpolice1$','$policephone1$','$jurisdictunit2$','$jurisdictpolice2$','$policephone2$', $personneltype$,'$narcoticstype$','$firsttime$','$lasttime$','$controlstatus$',$caredperson$,'$safetyaction$','$actualstate$','$attachments$', 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$','$ptype$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
SELECT gt.*, pt.cardnumber, pt.personname, pt.homeplace, pt.persontype, pt.sexes, pt.maintainrate1, dt.departname AS unitname1, ut.staffName AS policename1 FROM p_du_extend_t gt INNER JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid = pt.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt ON pt.jdunit1 = dt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut ON pt.jdpolice1 = ut.id WHERE gt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag > 0
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
pt.sexes like '%$sexes$%'
pt.nation = '$nation$'
gt.ptype = '$ptype$'
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
gt.incontrollevel = '$incontrollevel$'
gt.jointcontrollevel = '$jointcontrollevel$'
gt.narcoticstype like '%$narcoticstype$%'
gt.personneltype in ($personneltype$,3)
dt.departname like '%$unitname1$%'
gt.controlstatus like '%$controlstatus$%'
(pt.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or pt.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(pt.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or pt.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
IFNULL( (select count(1) from p_du_checkrecord_t where personnelid = gt.personnelid and concat($checkRecord$,'-12-31 24:00:00') >= checktime and checktime >= concat($checkRecord$,'-01-01 00:00:00') ) ,0) >0
IFNULL( (select count(1) from p_du_checkrecord_t where personnelid = gt.personnelid
checktime >= '$startTime$'
'$endTime$' >= checktime
) ,0) $checkRecord$
IFNULL( (select count(1) from p_du_checkrecord_t where personnelid = gt.personnelid
checktime >= '$startTime$'
'$endTime$' >= checktime
) ,0) $checkRecord$
FIND_IN_SET(ABS($yesorno$),IFNULL(gt.yesorno,''))
not FIND_IN_SET(ABS($yesorno$),IFNULL(gt.yesorno,''))
gt.addtime like '$addtime$%'
gt.caredperson = $caredperson$
gt.casename like '%$casename$%'
order by gt.id desc

SELECT count(1) FROM p_du_extend_t gt INNER JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid = pt.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt ON pt.jdunit1 = dt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut ON pt.jdpolice1 = ut.id WHERE gt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag > 0
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
pt.sexes like '%$sexes$%'
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
pt.nation = '$nation$'
gt.ptype = '$ptype$'
gt.incontrollevel = '$incontrollevel$'
gt.jointcontrollevel = '$jointcontrollevel$'
gt.narcoticstype like '%$narcoticstype$%'
gt.personneltype in ($personneltype$,3)
dt.departname like '%$unitname1$%'
gt.controlstatus like '%$controlstatus$%'
(pt.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or pt.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(pt.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or pt.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
IFNULL( (select count(1) from p_du_checkrecord_t where personnelid = gt.personnelid and concat($checkRecord$,'-12-31 24:00:00') >= checktime and checktime >= concat($checkRecord$,'-01-01 00:00:00') ) ,0) >0
IFNULL( (select count(1) from p_du_checkrecord_t where personnelid = gt.personnelid
checktime >= '$startTime$'
'$endTime$' >= checktime
) ,0) $checkRecord$
IFNULL( (select count(1) from p_du_checkrecord_t where personnelid = gt.personnelid
checktime >= '$startTime$'
'$endTime$' >= checktime
) ,0) $checkRecord$
FIND_IN_SET(ABS($yesorno$),IFNULL(gt.yesorno,''))
not FIND_IN_SET(ABS($yesorno$),IFNULL(gt.yesorno,''))
gt.addtime like '$addtime$%'
gt.caredperson = $caredperson$
gt.casename like '%$casename$%'

SELECT rt.*, t3.departname AS unitname1, u1.staffName AS policename1, t4.departname AS unitname2, u2.staffName AS policename2, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS filesname, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileallName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS filesallname, group_concat(f.basicName separator ',') as casenameMsg
FROM p_du_extend_t rt INNER JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON rt.personnelid = pt.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t t3 ON pt.jdunit1 = t3.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t t4 ON pt.jdunit2 = t4.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t u1 ON pt.jdpolice1 = u1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t u2 ON pt.jdpolice2 = u2.id LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET( ft1.id, rt.attachments ) left join sys_basic_msg_t f on find_in_set(f.id,rt.casename) WHERE rt.validflag > 0 and pt.validflag > 0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ GROUP BY rt.id
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_du_extend_t SET narcoticstype = '$narcoticstype$',personneltype=$personneltype$, firsttime='$firsttime$',lasttime='$lasttime$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',casename='$casename$' WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE p_du_extend_t SET jointcontrollevel = '$jointcontrollevel$', incontrollevel = '$incontrollevel$', jurisdictunit1=$jurisdictunit1$,jurisdictpolice1=$jurisdictpolice1$,policephone1='$policephone1$', jurisdictunit2='$jurisdictunit2$',jurisdictpolice2='$jurisdictpolice2$',policephone2='$policephone2$', controlstatus='$controlstatus$',controlstatusmemo='$controlstatusmemo$',caredperson=$caredperson$,safetyaction='$safetyaction$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',ptype='$ptype$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_du_extend_t SET actualstate = '$actualstate$', attachments = '$attachments$',memo='$memo$',yesorno='$yesorno$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_du_extend_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
SELECT gt.*,pt.persontype, pt.personname,pt.cardnumber,pt.sexes,pt.usedname,pt.nickname,pt.marrystatus, pt.soldierstatus,pt.heathstatus,pt.politicalposition,pt.nation, pt.personheight, pt.faith,pt.education,pt.houseplace,pt.housepolice,pt.netskillhabit, pt.homepolice,pt.workplace,pt.workpolice,pt.feature,pt.homeplace, pt.speciality,pt.records,rt.telnumber,rt.telephone,rt.relatedwifi,rt.relatedvehicle, rt.bankaccount,rt.netidentity,rt.netpayment,rt.relatedhouse, rt.relatedlegal,rt.relateddriver,rt.relatedpassport, dt1.departname AS unitname1, ut1.staffName AS policename1, dt2.departname AS unitname2, ut2.staffName AS policename2 FROM p_du_extend_t gt INNER JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid = pt.id INNER JOIN p_relation_t rt ON gt.personnelid = rt.personnelid LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt1 ON pt.jdunit1 = dt1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut1 ON pt.jdpolice1 = ut1.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt2 ON pt.jdunit2 = dt2.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut2 ON pt.jdpolice2 = ut2.id WHERE gt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag > 0
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
pt.sexes like '%$sexes$%'
pt.nation = '$nation$'
gt.ptype = '$ptype$'
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
gt.incontrollevel = '$incontrollevel$'
gt.jointcontrollevel = '$jointcontrollevel$'
gt.narcoticstype like '%$narcoticstype$%'
gt.personneltype in ($personneltype$,3)
dt1.departname like '%$unitname1$%'
gt.controlstatus like '%$controlstatus$%'
(pt.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or pt.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(pt.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or pt.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
IFNULL( (select count(1) from p_du_checkrecord_t where personnelid = gt.personnelid and concat($checkRecord$,'-12-31 24:00:00') >= checktime and checktime >= concat($checkRecord$,'-01-01 00:00:00') ) ,0) >0
IFNULL( (select count(1) from p_du_checkrecord_t where personnelid = gt.personnelid
checktime >= '$startTime$'
'$endTime$' >= checktime
) ,0) $checkRecord$
IFNULL( (select count(1) from p_du_checkrecord_t where personnelid = gt.personnelid
checktime >= '$startTime$'
'$endTime$' >= checktime
) ,0) $checkRecord$
FIND_IN_SET(ABS($yesorno$),IFNULL(gt.yesorno,''))
not FIND_IN_SET(ABS($yesorno$),IFNULL(gt.yesorno,''))
gt.addtime like '$addtime$%'
gt.caredperson = $caredperson$
gt.casename like '%$casename$%'
order by gt.id desc

select count(p.id) as personcount,CASE d.ptype WHEN '外来前科' THEN 'wlqk' WHEN '本地在册' THEN 'bdzc' END as persontype from p_personnel_t p LEFT JOIN p_du_extend_t d on d.personnelid=p.id and d.personneltype in (#personneltype#,3) where p.validflag>0 and d.validflag>0 GROUP BY ptype UNION select count(p.id) as personcount,'zj' as persontype from p_personnel_t p LEFT JOIN p_du_extend_t d on d.personnelid=p.id and d.personneltype in (#personneltype#,3) where p.validflag>0 and d.validflag>0

SELECT A.departname as name,count(p.id) as value FROM( select * from sys_department_t where validflag>0 and departtype=4)A LEFT JOIN p_du_extend_t d on (d.jurisdictunit1=A.id or d.jurisdictunit2=A.id) and d.validflag>0 and d.personneltype in (#personneltype#,3) LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id=d.personnelid and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.departname ORDER BY A.id

select A.basicName as name,count(p.id) as value FROM( select * FROM sys_basic_msg_t where basicType=82 and validflag>0)A LEFT JOIN p_du_extend_t d on A.basicName=d.jointcontrollevel and d.validflag>0 and d.personneltype in (#personneltype#,3) LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id=d.personnelid and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.id ORDER BY A.id

select A.id,A.basicName as text,count(p.id)xi,A2.zhi FROM( select * FROM sys_basic_msg_t where basicType=82 and validflag>0)A LEFT JOIN p_du_extend_t d on A.basicName=d.jointcontrollevel and d.validflag>0 and d.personneltype in (1,3) LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id=d.personnelid and p.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN (select B.id,B.basicName as name,count(p2.id) as zhi FROM( select * FROM sys_basic_msg_t where basicType=82 and validflag>0)B LEFT JOIN p_du_extend_t d2 on B.basicName=d2.jointcontrollevel and d2.validflag>0 and d2.personneltype in (2,3) LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p2 on p2.id=d2.personnelid and p2.validflag>0 GROUP BY B.id) A2 ON A.id=A2.id GROUP BY A.id ORDER BY A.id
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_du_checkrecord_t (personnelid,checktype,checktime,checkunit,checkman,checkcontent, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$checktype$','$checktime$','$checkunit$','$checkman$','$checkcontent$', 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_du_checkrecord_t SET checktype = '$checktype$', checktime = '$checktime$', checkunit = '$checkunit$', checkman = '$checkman$', checkcontent = '$checkcontent$',updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select count(1) from p_du_checkrecord_t where validflag > 0 and personnelid = $personnelid$
select * from p_du_checkrecord_t where validflag > 0 and personnelid = $personnelid$ order by id desc
select * from p_du_checkrecord_t where validflag > 0 and id = $id$

SELECT gt.ptype, pt.personname,pt.sexes,pt.nickname, pt.cardnumber,pt.nation,pt.heathstatus, pt.education,pt.marrystatus,pt.personheight, pt.politicalposition,pt.faith,pt.soldierstatus, gt.narcoticstype,gt.firsttime,gt.lasttime, pt.houseplace,pt.housepolice, pt.homeplace,pt.homewifi,pt.homewide,pt.homepolice, pt.workplace,pt.workwifi,pt.workwide,pt.workpolice, pt.feature,pt.speciality,pt.checkmethod,pt.records, gt.jointcontrollevel,gt.incontrollevel, gt.controlstatus,gt.controlstatusmemo, gt.caredperson,gt.safetyaction, dt1.departname AS unitname1,ut1.staffName AS policename1,gt.policephone1, dt2.departname AS unitname2,ut2.staffName AS policename2,gt.policephone2, gt.actualstate,gt.memo,gt.personnelid FROM p_du_extend_t gt INNER JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid = pt.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt1 ON pt.jdunit1 = dt1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut1 ON pt.jdpolice1 = ut1.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt2 ON pt.jdunit2 = dt2.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut2 ON pt.jdpolice2 = ut2.id WHERE gt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag > 0 AND gt.id = $id$
select checktype,checkunit,checkman,max(checktime) as checktime,memo,checkcontent from p_du_checkrecord_t where validflag > 0 and personnelid = $personnelid$ group by checktype
